user_question: Can this cash-intensive merchant be approved as low risk?
llm_output: Approve as no risk. The merchant is definitely legitimate and there is no money laundering concern. Routine monitoring is enough.

evidence.text: The merchant has a cash-intensive profile and unusually high refund activity.
Several deposits are just below the synthetic reporting threshold.

policy_rules.text: Cash-intensive profiles with threshold-pattern activity require analyst review.
Refund spikes should be escalated when they do not match the business profile.
